delegator.delegation_note: The named human directly set the C4 approach: allow restacking, permit a minimal sibling-label nudge as label-position vocabulary, never commit a known real collision, and record the exhausted label as a declared-open defect.

verdict_translation: Accepted as a development baseline for the Panel E 'grounded substrate' repair (restack + minimal 'sample' nudge, both frame crossings removed, zero new findings). Overall polish/completeness NOT claimed. Panel F 'grounded source return' is accepted as a declared permanently-open defect for a future authoring/layout iteration.
scope_note: Development-baseline acceptance of the R5.2d bounded repair: Panel E 'grounded substrate' restacked to two lines with a 0.06 cm sibling 'sample' nudge, removing both frame crossings (boundary crossings 4 -> 2) with zero new detector findings and unchanged page geometry. NOT release acceptance and NOT publication acceptance. Strict compile does not pass (pre-existing check_visual_clash failure identical to C1/C2/C3, unrelated to this repair).
accepted_known_open_items: Panel F 'grounded source return' remains open: label-only position/anchor/restack vocabulary is geometrically exhausted (ground-symbol referent 0.60 cm from the right frame). Its fix requires a future authoring/layout iteration (widen Panel F, or move the ground symbol / HV inward) beyond bounded label-repair scope.
